author: 鱼亦乐 (yuyile)
abstract: Script-to-storyboard video prompt writer for structured-prompt AI video tools (Seedance 2.0, Kling, 即梦). Ingests a full script/story/voiceover and auto-segments it into scene blocks; each block becomes a complete prompt with characters, props, scene, sound, mood & quality, and a shot list or long take (auto-decided) carrying shot size / composition / camera movement. Includes shot catalog, cinematic vocabulary, and composition templates.
